title: AjkerPatrika CMS Deployment
description: High-availability content management system infrastructure designed for a high-traffic news portal. Leveraged AWS Auto Scaling, Application Load Balancers, and Redis caching to handle millions of daily reads with minimal latency.
features: Auto-scaling group with launch templates based on CPU/memory load
NGINX reverse proxy with SSL certificate management via Let's Encrypt
PostgreSQL primary-replica setup for high availability database storage
CI/CD pipeline automated using GitHub Actions with automated deployment to ECS

title: Dynamic CMS Deployment
description: An automated infrastructure system that provisions independent preview/staging environments dynamically for developer feature branches. Integrated with Git hooks and Jenkins to spin up isolated container stacks.
features: Dynamic creation of staging environments using subdomains
Jenkins pipeline that builds, tests, and deploys containers per branch push
Automated cleanup of inactive developer environments after 3 days of idle time
Isolated container networks to ensure database security between previews

title: Django Production Infrastructure
description: Enterprise-grade production setup for a complex Django-based web application with async background task workers (Celery/Redis). Designed with secure VPC networking and automated backup scripts.
features: Celery worker queues containerized and managed for background jobs
Secured environment under private VPC subnets with NAT gateways
Automated database backup pipelines uploading encrypted snapshots to S3 daily
Gunicorn application server optimized behind NGINX reverse-proxy buffering
